_comment: questions 배열에 질문 텍스트만 추가/수정하면 됩니다. generate_mp3.py 실행 시 자동으로 MP3 생성.

questions: Tell me about where you live. Can you describe your home in detail? What does it look like?
What do you usually do at home in your free time? Describe your typical day at home.
Have you ever moved to a new place? Tell me about a memorable moving experience you had.
Describe a park that you often visit. Where is it located and what does it look like?
What do you usually do when you go to the park? Describe your typical visit.
Tell me about a memorable or interesting experience you had at a park.
Tell me about when you started doing yoga. How did you first get interested in it?
Describe your typical yoga session. What kinds of poses or exercises do you do?
Tell me about a memorable experience you had related to yoga.
Describe a beach that you like to visit. What does it look like? What can you find there?
What do you usually do when you go to the beach? Describe your typical beach day.
Tell me about a memorable experience you had at the beach.
Tell me about camping. Where do you usually go and who do you go with?
What do you usually do when you go camping? Describe a typical camping trip.
Tell me about a memorable or unexpected experience you had while camping.
Describe a concert venue you have visited. What did it look like? What was the atmosphere like?
What do you usually do before and during a concert? Describe your typical concert experience.
Tell me about the most memorable concert you have attended. Why was it special?
What kinds of performances or shows do you like to watch? Describe the type of venues you visit.
What do you usually do when you go to see a performance? Describe your typical experience.
Tell me about the most memorable performance you have ever seen. What made it so special?
Tell me about the kind of music you enjoy listening to. Who are your favorite artists or bands?
How and when do you usually listen to music? Describe your typical music listening habits.
Tell me about a memorable experience you had that is related to music.
What kind of movies do you like to watch? Tell me about your favorite genre or a favorite film.
How do you usually watch movies? Describe a typical movie-watching experience for you.
Tell me about a movie that was especially memorable to you. Why did it stick with you?
Tell me about how you typically spend your vacation at home. What kinds of things do you do?
Describe your ideal vacation at home. What would you do from morning to night?
Tell me about a memorable time you spent your vacation at home. What made it special?
Tell me about the furniture in your home. What kind of furniture do you have and where did you get it?
What is your favorite piece of furniture? Describe it in detail and explain why you like it.
Have you ever had a problem with a piece of furniture? Tell me about that experience.
Tell me about how you stay healthy. What do you do to take care of your health?
What do you usually do when you get sick? Describe how you take care of yourself.
Tell me about a time when you had a health problem. What happened and how did you deal with it?
Tell me about the transportation you use most often. How do you usually get around?
Describe your typical commute or daily travel. What do you see and do along the way?
Tell me about a memorable or unusual experience you had while using public transportation.
Tell me about the technology you use every day. What devices or apps do you rely on the most?
How has technology changed your daily life? Give me some specific examples.
Tell me about a time when technology caused a problem for you. What happened?
Tell me about how you usually do your banking. Do you go to a branch or use online banking?
Describe your local bank or a bank you frequently visit. What does it look like inside?
Tell me about a problem you have experienced at a bank. What happened and how was it resolved?
